Container.Name: Mem0-AIO
Container.Overview:
Mem0 (OpenMemory) is a Universal Memory Layer for AI Agents. It provides an intelligent memory layer using an MCP server and dashboard, allowing AI models to remember user preferences and adapt continuously.
[b]All-In-One (AIO) Edition[/b] This template uses `s6-overlay` to internally bundle and manage the Python API Backend, the Next.js Web UI, and the Qdrant Vector Database all inside a single managed container setup.
[b]Included Components[/b]: - Web UI (Port 3000) - MCP API Server (Port 8765) - Local Qdrant Database (No external VectorDB required)
Container.Description: Mem0 (OpenMemory) provides a unified self-hosted memory layer for AI interactions. This AIO unifies the UI, API, and Vector Database into one easy-to-manage container.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: The default Next.js dashboard UI port.

Config.Name: MCP Server Port
Config.Description: The default Python MCP API server port.

Config.Name: App Volumes - Qdrant Storage
Config.Description: Persistent storage for the internal Qdrant vector database (saves your AI memories).

Config.Name: OpenAI API Key
Config.Description: API Key for OpenAI. (Used for default LLM and Embeddings). If entirely using Ollama, this can be safely mocked (e.g. 'sk-ollama').

Config.Name: Default User
Config.Description: The default user namespace to create memories under for the UI dashboard.

Config.Name: Public API URL
Config.Description: The public URL where the UI client can reach the MCP server. If resolving externally (Nginx Proxy/Cloudflare), update this to match the external domain proxying to port 8765.

Config.Name: LLM Provider
Config.Description: Provider for Memory Operations. Change to 'ollama' to use local inference.

Config.Name: LLM Model
Config.Description: LLM Model name (e.g., 'gpt-4o-mini' or 'llama3.1:latest' if using Ollama).

Config.Name: Ollama Base URL
Config.Description: If using LLM_PROVIDER=ollama, specify your absolute Ollama IP endpoint here (e.g. http://192.168.1.50:11434).

Config.Name: Embedder Provider
Config.Description: Provider for Vector Embeddings. Change to 'ollama' to embed locally.

Config.Name: Embedder Model
Config.Description: Embedding Model name (e.g. 'text-embedding-3-small' or 'nomic-embed-text' if using Ollama).

Config.Name: Qdrant API URL
Config.Description: Internal Routing for the API to reach the embedded Qdrant Server. Only change if using an external DB.
